creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Category: japanese

Here is an ELFization patch for japanese/expect.
# japanese/expect/Makefile does not include lang/expect/Makefile, now.
# I think it's better to maintenance.

Fix: please apply following patch.
BEGIN>---8<cut here>8---


END>---8<cut here>8-----tvVQ9IR7wHeOCbF0bAF6Eo6KRE64kKbMAZRt61Sz8ljTFZ7z
